Finish Cleaning Corrected Data (pulled from Aquarius)

# Set year

```{r}
edi_year <- 2024
```

# Code Starts Here

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(aqsampr)
library(purrr)

# < add code to import here >
```

Filter out un-needed data

```{r}
# filter out replicate/blank data
df_year <- df_year %>%
  filter(qualityControlType == 'NORMAL')

# filter out Churn Bucket/Filter Container data
df_year <- df_year %>%
  filter(!observedProperty %in% c('Churn Bucket ID', 'Filter Container ID'))
```

```{r}
colnames(df_year)
```

```{r}
# format for EDI
df_year <- format_edi(df_year)

# check missing dates
df_year %>%
  filter(is.na(Date))
```

```{r}
unique(df_year$Analyte)
```

# Checks

```{r}
check_analytes(df_year, year = '2024')
```

```{r}
check <- check_duplicates(df_year, year = '2024', return_df = TRUE)
```

# Write file

```{r}
# write_csv(df_final, '01_WaterQuality/edi-annual-updates/data/final/edi_2024_update_QCCodes.csv')
```
